capabilities.name: Live GitHub private repository creation
boundaries: Requires a scoped, unexpired approval lock for the exact repository target.
Requires a passing boot check and foundation validation before execution.
Requires audit events for approval and execution.
Stops before any deploy, domain or DNS change, workflow activation, or paid action.
Netlify actions, n8n actions, live deploys, social posting, production changes, and domain changes are not proven capabilities.
capabilities.notes: Proven on 2026-07-03 through the full gate chain. This record describes a proven capability; it does not authorize any future execution without a new approval lock.

notes: Foundation registry only. No capability records are registered yet; future records require explicit scope, owner, safety tier, and validation.
